issues.description: First effect missing trigger context. Text '[Opponent's Turn]' indicates this is a passive effect that should trigger OnAttacked or similar, not Activated. Should be trigger-less passive or clarify as OnAttacked. Current Activated trigger is incorrect.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. '[Opponent's Turn]' in card text requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to indicate the boost persists during opponent's turn, not just until end of your turn.

AttachDon action incomplete. Card text requires placing 1 card from trash at bottom of deck as a cost/prerequisite before AttachDon can resolve. Current DSL omits the SearchDeck/retrieve-from-trash action.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Condition should include once-per-turn limiting mechanism (e.g., via activation tracking).
